title: Influence of calcium hydroxide/nano-chitosan as intracanal medication on push-out bond strength of epoxy resin and bioceramic sealers: an ex-vivo study.
abstract: The present study aimed to evaluate the impact of intracanal medicaments-calcium hydroxide (CH) and calcium hydroxide/nano-chitosan (CH/NC)-on the push-out bond strength (POBS) of AH Plus (AHP) and NeoSEALER Flo (NSF).
